HomePage.heroDesc: Physical NFC that open your digital menu instantly — no app, no reprinting, no hassle.
HomePage.startingAt: Starting at $24.99 · No monthly fees · Free shipping
HomePage.step01Desc: We ship a branded NFC to your venue. Peel, stick and done.
HomePage.step02Desc: Log in once, upload your existing menu PDF or LINK.
HomePage.step03Desc: A tap or scan opens your menu instantly on any phone.
HomePage.everythingDesc: Simple, reliable, and built for busy venues.
HomePage.featureNoAppDesc: Customers open the menu instantly in their browser — no download, no friction.
HomePage.featureUpdateDesc: Upload a new PDF and every tag in your venue shows the latest menu immediately.
HomePage.featureTrackDesc: See how many times your menu is scanned each day with built-in analytics.
HomePage.featurePhoneDesc: Works perfectly on every device, no compatibility issues.
HomePage.featureNfcDesc: Each order includes a physical tag that works with both NFC tap and QR scan.
HomePage.featurePdfDesc: Keep using the menu design you already have — just upload the PDF file.
HomePage.pricingDesc: No subscriptions. No surprises. Just your menu, always on.
HomePage.ctaDesc: Join 50+ venues already using NeedIt. Setup takes less than 10 minutes.

AboutPage.heroTitle:
Built for restaurants,
by someone who loves them
AboutPage.heroDesc: NeedIt was born from a simple frustration: watching great restaurants lose customers because their menus were outdated, hard to read, or simply unavailable when guests wanted them.
AboutPage.problemTitle: The problem we set out to solve
AboutPage.problemP1: Every time a restaurant prints a new menu, they spend money and time — and the moment it's printed, it's already a little out of date. Prices change. Dishes sell out. Seasonal items come and go.
AboutPage.problemP2: We saw the same pattern everywhere: restaurants stuck in a cycle of reprinting, laminating, and replacing menus, while their customers squinted at worn-out paper in dim lighting.
AboutPage.problemP3: We knew there was a better way. NFC technology was already in every modern smartphone. PDF tools were widely available. The only missing piece was a product that made it dead simple — no technical knowledge required.
AboutPage.problemP4: So we built NeedIt. A physical tag you stick to a table, linked to a PDF you upload online. Tap or scan, and your menu appears full-screen on any phone. Change your menu? Upload a new PDF. Done.
AboutPage.value1Desc: We designed NeedIt for the restaurant owner who doesn't have time to learn new software. If it takes more than 5 minutes, we haven't done our job.
AboutPage.value2Desc: No bloated dashboards. No complicated setups. One tag, one PDF, one scan. That's it — and that's all you need.
AboutPage.value3Desc: We listen to the restaurants we work with. Every feature update comes from real feedback from real venues using NeedIt every day.
AboutPage.missionTitle: Make digital menus accessible to every restaurant, everywhere
AboutPage.missionDesc: Whether you run a street food stall or a fine dining restaurant, you deserve modern tools that just work — without the complexity or the monthly bill. NeedIt delivers that in a small physical tag that costs less than a dinner for two.
AboutPage.ctaDesc: Let's get your venue set up with a digital menu that works as hard as you do.

ContactPage.sendMessageDesc: Leave your name and phone number and we'll call you back — usually within the same business day.
ContactPage.otherWaysDesc: Choose whatever works best for you — we respond on all channels.
ContactPage.whatsappDesc: Message us on WhatsApp for fast responses
ContactPage.whatsappReply: Often reply within minutes during business hours
